heading: Step 3: Create the  index.
body:
- Click the Indexes tab, then select Search Indexes.

- Click Create Atlas Search Index to open the index creation dialog box.

- Name the index `facet-tutorial`.

- Specify the JSON (Javascript Object Notation) MongoDB Search index definition.

  ```json
  {
    "mappings": { 
      "dynamic": true, 
      "fields": { 
          "genres": {
              "type": "token"
          }
      } 
    }
  }
  ```

- Click Create Search Index.

You can use [faceted navigation](fts-facet-ref) in queries that use the
[$search](pipe.$search) and [$searchMeta](pipe.$searchMeta) stages. In this
section, you will connect to your cluster and the run the sample query
against the `sample_mflix.movies` collection using the
[$searchMeta](pipe.$searchMeta) or [$search](pipe.$search) stage to group the
`genre` and `year` fields into buckets. To optimize performance:

- Use [$searchMeta](pipe.$searchMeta) stage if you only need the `facet` metadata.

- Use [$search](pipe.$search) stage if you want to retrieve both the query
  results and the `facet` metadata.

Open MongoDB Compass and connect to your cluster. For detailed
instructions on connecting, see [Compass](atlas-connect-via-compass).

On the Database screen, click the `sample_mflix`
database, then click the `movies` collection.

The query uses the following `searchMeta` operator clauses:

- [near](near-ref) to search for movies released with a
  `pivot` distance from  `origin` of approximately three months
  from November 11, 1921

- `facets` to request the number of movies in each genre in the
  `genres` string array field and the number of movies in the years
  1910 to 1939, inclusive

To run this query in MongoDB Compass:

- Click the Aggregations tab.

- Click Select..., then configure each of the following
  pipeline stages by selecting the stage from the dropdown and adding
  the query for that stage. Click Add Stage to add
  additional stages.

  You can run this query using [$searchMeta](pipe.$searchMeta) or using
  [$search](pipe.$search) with the `SEARCH_META` aggregation variable.

  $searchMeta

  | Pipeline Stage | Query                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
  | -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
  | $searchMeta    | \{ "index": "facet-tutorial", "facet": \{ "operator": \{ "near": \{ "path": "released", "origin": ISODate("1921-11-01T00:00:00.000+00:00"), "pivot": 7776000000 } }, "facets": \{ "genresFacet": \{ "type": "string", "path": "genres" }, "yearFacet": \{ "type": "number", "path": "year", "boundaries": \[1910, 1920, 1930, 1940] } } } } |

  $search with $$SEARCH_META

  | Pipeline Stage | Query                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
  | -------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
  | $search        | \{ "index": "facet-tutorial", "facet": \{ "operator": \{ "near": \{ "path": "released", "origin": ISODate("1921-11-01T00:00:00.000+00:00"), "pivot": 7776000000 } }, "facets": \{ "genresFacet": \{ "type": "string", "path": "genres" }, "yearFacet": \{ "type": "number", "path": "year", "boundaries" : \[1910,1920,1930,1940] } } } } |
  | $facet         | \{ meta: \[ \{ $replaceWith: "$$SEARCH\_META" }, \{ $limit: 1 } ] }                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
  | $set           | \{ meta: \{ $arrayElemAt: \["$meta", 0] } }                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |

  If you enabled Auto Preview, MongoDB Compass displays the
  following documents next to the `$set` pipeline stage:

  ```javascript
  count: Object
      lowerBound: 20878
      facet: Object
      genresFacet: Object
          buckets: Array (10)
          0: Object
              _id: "Drama"
              count: 12149
          1: Object
              _id: "Comedy"
              count: 6436
          2: Object
              _id: "Romance"
              count: 3274
          3: Object
              _id: "Crime"
              count: 2429
          4: Object
              _id: "Thriller"
              count: 2400
          5: Object
              _id: "Action"
              count: 2349
          6: Object
              _id: "Adventure"
              count: 1876
          7: Object
              _id: "Documentary"
              count: 1755
          8: Object
              _id: "Horror"
              count: 1432
          9: Object
              _id: "Biography"
              count: 1244
      yearFacet: Object
          buckets: Array (3)
          0: Object
              _id: 1910
              count: 14
          1: Object
              _id: 1920
              count: 47
          2: Object
              _id: 1930
              count: 238
  ```

The results show metadata results for two types of facet search. The
`genresFacet` document shows the number of movies in each genre and
the `yearFacet` document shows a count of the number of movies
within the boundaries:

- `1910-1920`, inclusive lower bound for the `1910` bucket and exclusive upper bound for the `1920` bucket

- `1920-1930`, inclusive lower bound for the `1920` bucket and exclusive
  upper bound for the `1930` bucket

- `1930-1940`, inclusive lower bound for the `1930` bucket and exclusive
  upper bound for the `1940` bucket

You can learn more about the [faceted navigation](fts-facet-ref) in MongoDB Search with the following
course or video.
